messages.content:
Can you rewrite the following excerpt to be easier to understand?

"to ease, to acclimate the death of objects by causing them to pass through a sort of pious site, a dusty chapel where, in the guise of keeping them alive, we allow them a decent interval of dim agony."

We help make it easier for objects to be forgotten and accepted as no longer useful. We do this by letting them go through a special place, like a dusty chapel, where we pretend to keep them alive for a little while, even though they are actually experiencing a sad and fading existence.
Rewrite it to be at A1 Elementary reading level.

We help make it easier for things to be forgotten and accepted as not important anymore. We do this by letting them go through a special place, like a dusty old building, where we pretend to keep them alive for a little while, even though they are actually feeling sad and getting dimmer.

We make it easier for things to be forgotten and accepted as not important anymore. We do this by pretending to keep them alive in a special place, even though they are actually getting dimmer and sadder.
我们帮助让物品更容易被遗忘并被接受为不再重要的东西。我们做法是让它们通过一个特别的地方，就像一个尘封的老建筑，我们假装在保持它们的活力一段时间，即使它们实际上正在经历渐暗、悲伤的状态。
निमेष स्मृति-स्थानं द्वारा पदार्थानां मरणं सुखदं कुर्वामः। निमेषेभ्यः तानि धूलि-पूर्णं पवित्रं चपेलं प्रतिपद्य जीवितानि रक्षयामः, हान्यन्ते च दक्षिणं दुःखं अनुभवन्ति।

Tinutulungan naming maging madali para sa mga bagay na malimot at tanggapin na hindi na mahalaga. Ginagawa namin ito sa pamamagitan ng pagpapanggap na pinananatiling buhay ang mga ito sa isang espesyal na lugar, kahit na sila ay unti-unting namumulubha at naghihirap.

We help make it easier for objects to be forgotten and accepted as no longer important. We do this by pretending to keep them alive in a special place, even though they are gradually fading and experiencing suffering.
Easier to forget and accept objects, we help. Pretending to keep them alive in a special place, we do. Fading and suffering, they are, gradually.
Now Rock Bottom speak (i.e a single word partitioned by blowing raspberries)

Bluh-'ffft'-'bth'-'heh'-'rah'-'mmph'. (Translation: Objects, bluh-'ffft', forgotten and 'bth', accepted. Blowing raspberries: Pretending, heh, alive. Special place, 'mmph'. Fading, suffering, 'mmph'.)
